blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,658 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
